title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

items.title: Pressure Index 77/100 (critical)
items.content_text: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 77/100 (critical). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 71.5%.
